reviews.comment:
Nos acababan de explicar que sólo podía ser comida para llevar, al ingresar para solicitarla nos increpa un empleado y de muy mala manera casi nos echa, detrás nuestro ingresan 7 personas y los acomodan en dos mesas distintas, le sirven la carta con el menú del día. Elitismo? Los precios una estafa y sólo aceptaban efectivo, una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
We had just been told that it was only available for takeout. When we went inside to order, an employee confronted us and very rudely almost threw us out. Seven other people came in behind us and were seated at two different tables. They were given the menu with the daily specials. Elitism? The prices were outrageous, and they only accepted cash. A disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBczZlTmVBEAE
